name: small room
hints: A small room with strange music playing. There are exits north and west.
LIST to listen to the music - it sounds like a space opera.
N leads into the windy maze. W leads back to the knob room.
This is a connector between the knob room (W) and the windy maze (N).

effects: Message: Sounds like a space opera

notes: Small room with music, reached via PULL YELL in room 10. N=windy maze (32), W=knob room (10). LIST plays music (Easter egg reference).
